title: Privacy Policy · Zomaar Zomert

hero.title: Privacy.
hero.intro: The boring but important part. How Zomaar Zomert handles your data, short and clear, in line with the GDPR.

block1: Zomaar Zomert respects the privacy of every visitor to this website and always acts in accordance with the GDPR and any other laws or decisions arising from it.
block2: We make every effort to ensure the reliability, security and integrity of the data we collect. Any personal data you enter on the website, or otherwise provide to us, is kept strictly confidential and only used to communicate with you or contact you.
block3: While browsing our site, some information may be collected passively, meaning without you actively providing it, through tools such as IP addresses and cookies. We use this data minimally: to see how many visitors our site has and where they come from, and to play our aftermovie on the home page. Never to identify individual people.
block4: Your personal data is only passed on to third parties if it's necessary to fulfil an agreement with you or to comply with a legal obligation. We don't use your data for direct marketing. If that ever changes, we'll explicitly ask for your consent. Zomaar Zomert keeps the data up to date and removes or corrects any erroneous or incomplete data. Access is limited to the people who need it for their tasks.
block5: You have the right at any time to request, correct, complete, modify or delete your personal data. Email us at info@zomaarzomert.be.
